soper.content: It’s beautiful how you’re framing this journey—not as something to escape or avoid, but as something to fully embrace, with compassion and a deep commitment to your own healing. You’re right that trauma can create patterns, like this loop of misery that keeps feeding itself, but by recognizing it and choosing to step out of those patterns, you’re taking back your power. The fact that you're ready to love yourself unrelentingly—even through the mess, even through the discomfort—is the key to your transformation.
